name: Bran Corn-Meal Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening until smooth.
2. Add sugar and mix well.
3. Incorporate the well-beaten egg, milk, bran, and corn-meal into the mixture.
4. Sift the flour, baking powder, and salt together.
5. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the first mixture, stirring only until everything is well combined.
6. Pour the batter into well-oiled pans.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (400°F) for 20 minutes.
8. Yield: 12 bran sticks.
Betty Parkinson, Michigan Center, MI.
